sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6461" key="a)nadifa/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναδῑφάω</orth>, <sense id="n6461.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grope after,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
